prestazioni: LS3 6.2L V8 (L99 variant) stroker build to 7.0L using a Callies DragonSlayer crankshaft, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (11.5:1 compression) with ARP L19 head studs and MLS head gaskets from SCE for boost readiness

Harrop HTV2300 supercharger kit with a custom 3.5" pulley, dual-core intercooler, and a Bosch 044 fuel pump paired with ID1000 injectors, tuned via HP Tuners with a custom OS flash for E85 compatibility and 650+ RWHP on 98 octane

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Harrop 9.5" differential with 3.73:1 gears, C&R Racing aluminum radiator with dual SPAL 16" fans, and a Tilton twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel for LS3 torque management
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB-WORKS kit (UTE-specific rear fenders with 30mm flares) paired with a carbon fiber tailgate from Seibon and a custom bed liner delete for weight savings

OEM+ aggressive stance with BC Racing BR coilovers (8kg front / 10kg rear springs) and Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (19x10 +15 front, 19x12 +25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/19 front, 315/30/19 rear)

Full carbon fiber aero package: Rocket Bunny front bumper with integrated canards, custom carbon fiber side skirts, and a Maxton Design GT-style rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5" Invidia N1 cat-back system
